data.body: Brainstorm (2026-06-25) + adversarial digest trace conclusion: NO live cross-clone determinism bug. Per-digest verdicts — signing.py: persisted+recomputed but sign/verify use the same encoder AND it already uses the canonical kwargs (ensure_ascii=False) -> migrates byte-identically; mutation.py (ensure_ascii=True): BENIGN, manifest hash not cross-compared, attestation hashes file BYTES (round-trips), so PRESERVE ascii_only=True (do NOT 'fix'); schema.py (ensure_ascii=False): BENIGN, in-process workflow lint; conflict_resolver._hash_value (default=str): BENIGN, ProvenanceLedger rebuilt in-memory per run; canonical.py: serialization only (no hash), reducer reads parsed keys. Conclusion: pure DRY, freeze every site's output bytes. Stale citations corrected: canonical.py HAS 6 importers; orchestrator.py:688-689 has no canonical-JSON code. Cluster 2 right-sized to the single genuine duplication (two _advisory_lock backoff fns); no universal retry() helper.
